content: Initial ART regimens for treatment-naïve adults: 1) Bictegravir/TDF/FTC or Bictegravir/TAF/FTC (single tablet); 2) Dolutegravir + TDF/FTC or TAF/FTC; 3) Dolutegravir/lamivudine (for selected patients without HBV, baseline VL <500,000, no resistance). Preferred protease inhibitor-based: Darunavir/cobicistat + TDF/FTC or TAF/FTC. Treatment goals: viral suppression (<50 copies/mL) within 3-6 months, immune reconstitution, prevention of transmission. Monitoring: viral load at baseline, 2-8 weeks after initiation/change, then every 3-6 months; CD4 count at baseline and periodically. Lifelong adherence critical to prevent resistance. Pre-exposure prophylaxis (PrEP) with TDF/FTC or TAF/FTC reduces acquisition risk by >99% when adherent.
